title: Morning layout sweep
content: Cleaned up the feed spacing and tightened the card rhythm. Small change, better scanability.

title: Tiny API bridge
content: Frontend now talks to Mongo through the backend instead of keeping everything local. Less fake state, more real data.

title: Repost: Ana's grid note
content: This is the kind of note I want to keep around in the feed.

title: Grid study
content: Tried a two-column layout with stronger spacing between metadata and body. The feed reads faster now.

title: Thought on avatars
content: Profile avatars work better when they stay small and predictable. Big avatars steal attention from the post.

title: Repost: Khan's note
content: Useful reminder on keeping the app state narrow.

title: Weekend bike reset
content: Shipped code in the morning and took the bike out at sunset. Best way to keep the brain moving.

title: Comment payload check
content: Persisting comment likes in the backend makes the feed feel much more real. Local-only state was the missing bridge.

title: Repost: Frontend bridge note
content: A small repack of the feed data solves a surprising amount of friction.
